name: Condemned Maiden
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>失</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>楽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your opponent's turn, you can activate 1 Quick-Play Spell Card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Condemned Maiden" once per Duel.
mnst_eff: During your opponent's turn, you can activate 1 Quick-Play Spell Card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Condemned Maiden" once per Duel.
eff: During your opponent's turn, you can activate 1 Quick-Play Spell Card from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Condemned Maiden" once per Duel.

mst: Allows activation of Spell Cards from the player's hand during the opponent's turn
